case_title: EUGENE HENRY AUSTIN VS. MARY ELIZABETH FUA

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, EUGENE HENRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$20.00) SERVED OCT-10-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FUA, MARY ELIZABETH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF EUGENE HENRY AUSTIN. DEFENDANT MARY ELIZABETH FUA DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY AUSTIN, EUGENE HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT FUA, MARY ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/13/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, EUGENE HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUA, MARY ELIZABETH $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
